description:
Mega Man Legends is a 1997 action-adventure game released by Capcom. It is the first game in the Mega Man Legends
sub-series of Mega Man games from Capcom. Explore dungeons, fight pirates and save kattlelox island from its
imminent demise.

v0.1.0.description:
# Mega Man Legends - Archipelago 

## Requirements
- Archipelago 0.6.3 or later
- A Windows version of [DuckStation](https://www.duckstation.org/)
- A legal copy of a Mega Man Legends (US) ROM
- The latest release version of the Mega Man Legends Client and apworld

## Instructions
1. Download the latest MMLAP.zip and mml.apworld files from the GitHub release page.
2. Double click the apworld to install your Archipelago installation.
3. Extract MMLAP.zip and note where MMLAP.Desktop.exe is.
4. Open DuckStation and load your ROM file.
5. Open MMLAP.Desktop.exe, the Mega Man Legends client. You will likely want to do so as an administrator.
6. In the top left of the Mega Man Legends client, click the "burger" menu to open the settings page.
7. Enter your host, slot, and optionally your password.
8. Click Connect. The first time you connect, a few error messages may appear - these are okay.
9. Start playing!

## What does randomization do to this game?

### Locations
- The opening of most chests, cardboard boxes, and garbage pails.
- Peeking into hidden holes in the wall.
- Defeating bosses

### Items
Any item associated with a location above. At the moment, this includes:
- Most items needed to craft items (Jump Springs, Drill Arm, Jet Skates, etc.)
- Most keys
- Some buster parts
- Most museum items

### Completion Goals
- Defeat Juno

### Anything else?
Stay tuned!
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
- Flutter logic fix
- Enable Archipelago commands and general messages from the MMLAP client
v0.1.1.title: v0.1.1

v0.2.0.description:
# v0.2.0 Changelog

## What to expect
- A mostly playable experience with some (possibly game breaking) bugs
- Incomplete hideout quest implementation
- Post-Juno cutscene will not load if you skipped content

## New Features
- New locations / items are randomized into the location / item pools:
  - Cardon Forest Sub-Gate key pickups / keys.
  - Rescuing the junk shop man / Mine Parts Kit.
  - Turning in the Bag to the Inspector / Arm Supporter.
  - Adding Pick to the item pool (no location).

## Quality of Life Updates
- Prevent a soft-lock where you could enter the Old City warehouse but could not exit. The warehouse is not properly locked up tight before the surfacing the Sub-City entrances in the Main Gate.
- Rename "Balkon Gerät defeated" to "Balkon Gerat defeated" for easier hinting.
- Add item name groups:
  - "Cardon Forest Sub-Gate Key"
  - "Lake Jyun Sub-Gate Key"
  - "Clozer Woods Sub-Gate Key"
  - "Sub-City Key"
- Add ! prefix to client commands to be consistent with other randomizers (try !help).
- Update README for clearer setup instructions.

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed an issue where defeating Juno would not release the goal.
- Fixed an issue with some checks giving both the randomized and vanilla items.
- Fixed an issue where a few garbage pail locations were unobtainable:
  - The downtown pail containing the Saw was not obtainable if you already had the Saw
  - The downtown pail containing the Bag was not obtainable if you already had the Bag
  - The left pail behind the hospital was un-checkable
- Fixed a couple cases where two chest locations would release simultaneously.
- Fixed multiple issues with text boxes due to not re-writing overwritten text back. This was causing issues such as:
  - Some chests would not show text boxes at all.
  - Re-checking already checked containers would show the old message (without giving you the item).
  - Some items were made unobtainable, such as the Flower and Hideout pickup items.
- Fixed an issue where reloading a save would not recover lost progress, such as reloading after death. Now, upon loading a save, the default behavior is to:
  1. Re-receive all previously received non-zenny items.
  2. Open all chests, garbage pails, boxes, holes that were previously opened.
- Fixed some spelling errors in location names.
- Fixed an issue which was adding multiple duplicate items into the item pool unintentionally. 

Thanks to Uroogla for the code contributions and to the community for all of the excellent bug reports and feedback so far. Stay tuned for more updates!
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

v0.2.1.description:
# v0.2.1 Changelog

## Bug Fixes 
- Fixed an issue with the 'Turn in missing bag' location which didn't require having the Red Refractor.
- Fixed an issue where the library garbage pail location was not completable after the Saw was already turned in.
- Fixed an issue where the 'complete the museum' location was not actually completable.
- Remove Flower, Comic Book, Beetle, and Stag Beetle from the item pool. These were added previously to mitigate a separate logic issue which is now fixed. The corresponding pickups are not yet implemented as randomized locations
- Rename 'Shekuten pillar room' to 'Shekuten platform room'.
- Fixed an issue where the location memory check of 'Underground ruins, Shekuten platform room hole' was just having the Old Shield.
- Fixed the text box of 'Underground ruins, Clozer exit chest' which was suffering from overflow by another text box.
- Fix an issue with logic having to do with cracked wall requirements requiring both the Drill arm and the Grand Grenade.

## Known Issues
- The Cardon Forest Sub-Gate key pickup locations exist if and only if you don't already have the corresponding key. Therefore the locations aren't easily randomized, and the items in the item pool are inconsequential.
v0.2.1.title: v0.2.1

v0.2.2.description:
# v0.2.2 Changelog

## Quality of Life Improvements
- The last host and slot credentials successfully used are pre-loaded into the client.
- The hint and received items tabs in the client now work.
- Added a client compatibility check.

## Bug Fixes 
- Remove some remnants of the Flower, Beetle, Stag Beetle, and Comic Book that were partially removed in v0.2.1.
v0.2.2.title: v0.2.2

v0.2.3.description:
# Changelog

## Bug Fixes 
- Fixed an issue where completing multiple locations simultaneously (e.g. starting an Easy Mode run, connecting late after checking locations, completing the goal) could corrupt some text boxes. This was a potential game-breaking bug.
v0.2.3.title: v0.2.3
